title: Beauty Advisor
location: Hong Kong Special Administrati, HK, HK, 999077
job_description:
Coty is a world leader in beauty and home to an illustrious roster of cosmetic, skincare and fragrance brands. And our company has a mission: to challenge the definition of beauty, to encourage authenticity and celebrate diversity. Because to us at Coty, beauty isn’t about conforming to somebody else’s ideal. It’s about inclusion and liberating everyone to shine in their unique way.
THE ROLE
Your role is to participate in the development of the retail Beauty sales, You will ensure that customers are given a quality service at counter, as well as a customized consultation, being able to advise and demonstrate full product range with your expert knowledge on both Make-up and Fragrance.
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
In this role you will be responsible for:
Achieve targets and KPIs, and increase brand sell-out
Provide outstanding quality of service by following our sales techniques and service codes, conduct demonstration of products
Ensure the counter is clean, tidy and well maintained
Apply brand’s visual merchandising and in-store excellence guidelines
WHAT YOU’LL BRING
ESSENTIAL:
2+ years work experience in make-up artistry
Make-up school graduated - degree that includes fashion, runway, and editorial make-up courses
Creative, artistic, charismatic, open minded
Connected to the brand core values
Able to understand the brand’s aesthetic: recognize its style and create an appropriate, original look for it and in line with it
Strong communication & listening skills
Able to deal with a fast-paced work environment

title: Beauty Advisor
location: Hong Kong Special Administrati, HK, HK, 999077
job_description:
Gucci Beauty/Burberry Beauty
RESPONSIBILITIES
Your main focus :
負責品牌產品日常銷售工作以達成銷售目標
保持工作範圍整潔及確保店鋪有足夠貨存
提供答顧客疑難，提供專業顧客服務解，介紹符合顧客需求的產品
YOU ARE A COTY FIT
1年或以上化粧品或香水零售經驗
具有3年或以上零售經驗及領導才能，將考慮聘用為資深美容顧問
對化粧品及香水行業有豐富認識及充滿熱誠
持有國際認可化粧證書
開朗、主動、具責任感及有合作精神
RECRUITMENT PROCESS
Our recruiter will contact you within 10 working days.
A telephone/online introductory meeting follows.
A first online/in-person interview
A second interview
You will receive a proposal with the terms of employment.
ABOUT COTY
Coty is one of the world’s largest beauty companies with an iconic portfolio of brands across fragrance, color cosmetics, skincare, and body care. At Coty, we celebrate the entire human kaleidoscope and cultivate a culture of fearless kindness. Therefore, we are proud to be an equal opportunities employer. We do not discriminate against any candidate or employee and strive to be an open, inclusive and diverse workplace where all employees can be their authentic self. Join us in making over the world of beauty!
For additional information about Coty Inc., please visit
www.coty.com/your-career
.
Unsolicited services or offers from recruitment agencies or intermediaries will not be responded to.

title: Senior Brand Communication Executive
location: Hong Kong Special Administrati, HK, HK, 999077
job_description:
RESPONSIBILITIES
Your main focus:
Build the brand image, develop visibility and reinforce locally its reputation over time
Build and implement a 360° external communication strategy in consistency with the international brand communication strategy and the local business strategy for the entity
Implement integrated communication campaigns on major product launches, brand events
Measure and report performance of all communication campaigns, and assess against goal with ROI and KPIs
Track media coverage, identify trends and insights, and optimize spend and performance based on the insights
Develop and manage media relations and external networks (Influencers, Micro Influencers, XHS Influencers, Celebrities, Magazine Editors, Beauty Journalists etc.)
Manage brands’ social media accounts
Manage brand communications budget
Administrative support includes PR stock management and PO creation
YOU ARE A COTY FIT
As an experienced role, you get energy from working in a fast-paced, diverse and international environment. Other than that, you:
3+ years’ experience in Marketing, luxury beauty marketing will be a credit.
Project Management: Ability to work independently to deliver project deliverables.
Strong communication, and good at coordinating and mobilizing the internal and external resources.
Strong beauty sense and Luxury taste.
OUR BENEFITS
As our this role, some of the benefits you will receive are:
A salary that matches your knowledge and experience
Great holiday benefits
Comprehensive medical and commercial insurance
Fair rewards given based on performance and individual abilities

A telephone/online introductory meeting follows.

A second interview

title: Retail Supervisor
location: Hong Kong Special Administrati, HK, HK, 999077
job_description:
Purpose of the role:
Act as the key driving force for business development and management for Prestige Retail & Wholesale Sector.
Oversee daily operations for Prestige Retail Sector, from managing staff, inventory, operational flows to ensuring retail and operation excellence.
Support Business Development Manager/ Retail Manager to create and achieve sales goals by driving excellent activation and ensuring fulfilment.
In all circumference, to mmaintain high quality of customer experience and retail excellence to drive both offtake sales and sell in revenue.
RESPONSIBILITIES
Your main focus:
Business Planning and Management
Support Business Development Manager/ Retail Manager in developing business strategies and identifying business potential with guidance to convert the vision into achievable goals.
Establish sales objectives by forecasting and developing monthly/ yearly sales targets and KPIs for wholesale customer and front line workforce.
Drive ambitious sales volume with company strategic product mix in accordance with brand directions.
Understand the competitive landscape and market trends to modify business action to react the changing retailing world.
Resourcing optimization to protect company profit on each investment.
Achieve Company Goals and Target
Drive & achieve the successful implement of brand activities with marketing team to maximize traffic, conversion, customer recruitment and sales.
Track, analysis and communicate KPIs to ensure delivery of sales target.
Provide key business insights and propose timely action to ensure sales delivery.
Drive Retail Excellence
Develop holistic customer journey and selling ceremony to perform Best-In-Class shopping experience in the market.
Strengthen front line workforce mindset on driving customer satisfaction and excellent service.
Build up customer loyalty with effective CRM program, by understanding customer purchasing behaviour and preference across different brands, channels and doors.
Closely monitoring on team performance to deliver consistent service standard, by mystery shopping program, role play, coaching etc.
Team Development & Performance
Cultivate team with strong fighting spirit, positive and Best-In-Class mindset.
Build up a high effective team by designing team structure, recruiting, developing and retaining talent to maximize their productivity.
Collaborate with HR on recruitment, talent management, compensation direction and disciplinary policy.
Identify development focus of team and individual workforce, then to work with Training & Education Team to set training priority and implement training roadmap.
Formulate system on performance checking of workforce and evaluate effectiveness of each people development action.
Propose commission and incentive scheme based on Reward-On-KPI mindset, to elevate team performance, as well as to maintain competitive package compared beauty industry.
Operational Management
Maintain effective and compliance operation flows.
Collaborate with all stakeholders, to improve operational outcome and simplify the procedure.
Asset management at front line area to protect company interests, including stock and material control.
Key Account Management
Be a Coty Ambassador to introduce brand and product direction to key clients.
Manage and nurture business relationship with key clients, by understanding business needs, anticipating challenges and providing strategic business plan.
Act as a bridge between Coty and key clients on leading projects and aligning business plan with internal stakeholders.
Be a strategic mastermind behind crafting brand activation plans from key clients.
Forecast and monitor sales trend to ensure delivering revenue and profitability to Coty.
Work with cross functional teams to meet deadlines/ lead time required for promotional packs, price changes arrangement, new product launch, POSM and others to ensure on-time and effective implementation.
Plan and execute sales promotions, new product listings, in-store activities, and marketing events in collaboration with key accounts
Closely monitor product launches, execution and sell-in /sell-through results and reports as in monthly basis.
YOU ARE A COTY FIT
As an experienced role, you get energy from working in a fast-paced, diverse and international environment. Other than that, you:
Bachelor’s degree in business management and/or Marketing (or related/equivalent).
Minimum of 3 years’ experience of sales, retail or marketing role in FMCG/ Retailing/ Wholesale Industry, experience in Beauty or Luxury Product industries is added benefit.
Previous experience of retail operation management.
Result oriented with strong ability to drive team performance and inspire growth in a fast-paced and challenging environment.
Energetic, well-organized, presentable, detail-minded, logical thinking, able to work independently
Able to work under pressure and tight schedule
Customer-centric and have a mindset of attention to details and quality.
Strong business acumen and solid analytical skills.
Excellent leadership, interpersonal, communication and presentation skills.
Excellent spoken and written communication skills of English, Cantonese and Mandarin.
Competent with Microsoft Office.
Travel is needed but not frequent.
OUR BENEFITS
As our this role, some of the benefits you will receive are:
A salary that matches your knowledge and experience
Great holiday benefits
Comprehensive medical and commercial insurance
Fair rewards given based on performance and individual abilities
RECRUITMENT PROCESS
Our recruiter will contact you within 10 working days.
A telephone/online introductory meeting follows.
A first online/in-person interview
A second interview
You will receive a proposal with the terms of employment.
ABOUT COTY
Coty is one of the world’s largest beauty companies with an iconic portfolio of brands across fragrance, color cosmetics, skincare, and body care. At Coty, we celebrate the entire human kaleidoscope and cultivate a culture of fearless kindness. Therefore, we are proud to be an equal opportunities employer. We do not discriminate against any candidate or employee and strive to be an open, inclusive and diverse workplace where all employees can be their authentic self. Join us in making over the world of beauty!

title: Senior Field Coaching Executive
location: Hong Kong Special Administrati, HK, HK, 999077
job_description:
RESPONSIBILITIES
Your main focus:
Mentoring salespeople
Cultivating solid relationships with customers to ensure a continuous flow of sales revenue
Ensuring that all sales administration and customer service activities run smoothly
Providing overall guidance to newly recruited Beauty Advisor
To be successful in this role, you should have a good understanding of sales techniques and the ability to motivate employees of varying seniority. Ultimately, you will help our salespeople develop their skills and achieve their quotas.
YOU ARE A COTY FIT
As an experienced role, you get energy from working in a fast-paced, diverse and international environment. Other than that, you:
Work experience as a Sales Coach, Sales Trainer, or similar role
Experience in MUA or customer service position is a plus
Excellent communication skills with the ability to motivate people
Excellent knowledge of makeup products (Skincare products) will be an advantage
Problem-solving skills
Additional training certification is a plus
